meta.title: Nathan Champagne - AI & Software Engineer Portfolio
meta.description: Portfolio of Nathan Champagne - AI & Software Engineer based in Paris, France. Projects in machine learning, computer vision, and software development.

heroBar.emailAria: Send an email to Nathan Champagne

projects.hrevolution: 2nd place at the HrFlow.ai GenAI & HR Hackathon. Platform for continuous analysis of job applications, leveraging GenAI for explainable scoring and tagging.
projects.rlkart: Kart racing simulation powered by Reinforcement Learning. Custom web-based track editor and AI agent trained with PPO and PyBullet physics.
projects.mnist: Implementation of a Convolutional Neural Network from scratch in C++ to classify the MNIST handwritten digit dataset.
projects.ocr-sudoku: Uses Optical Character Recognition to load a Sudoku image, extract the digits, and applies AI algorithms to solve the puzzle.
projects.ms402: Multiplayer video game developed in Unity. Full gameplay loop, networking and level design.
projects.vim-airline: A minimal airline theme for VIM inspired by lightline.
projects.nixos-config: Declarative and modular NixOS flake for my personal machine, soon extended to my self-hosted server (currently Debian). This server runs this portfolio and all the projects showcased here. DNS management, Cloudflare, SSH, security hardening and full server deployment from scratch.
projects.advent-of-code: My Advent of Code solutions - an annual programming challenge with daily puzzles throughout December.
projects.portfolio: Portfolio built with Next.js and TypeScript, with WebGL-powered animations and bilingual support.
